chief_complaint: I'm exhausted all the time and I almost fainted yesterday.
history_of_present_illness: 5-month history of progressive fatigue, decreased appetite with 12-lb weight loss, and intermittent nausea. Over the past 6 weeks, increasing dizziness on standing. Yesterday nearly lost consciousness when standing up from a chair. Reports unusual salt cravings, eating pickles straight from the jar. Has been seen twice in the past 4 months and told she has depression or possible chronic fatigue syndrome.
past_medical_history: Hashimoto's thyroiditis on levothyroxine (well-controlled per recent TSH)
social_history: Non-smoker. No drug use. Married, two children. Elementary school teacher, on medical leave for past two weeks due to fatigue.
family_history: Mother has type 1 diabetes. Aunt has thyroid problems.

vitals.orthostatic_vitals: Supine HR 96 / BP 98/62; Standing HR 118 / BP 82/54. Significant orthostatic drop with reflex tachycardia.

physical_exam: Thin, tired-appearing. Skin shows hyperpigmentation of palmar creases, gums, and old scar on left knee. Lungs clear. Heart regular, no murmur. Abdomen soft, mildly tender in epigastrium. No edema. No goiter.

initial_workup.cbc: Mild normocytic anemia: Hgb 11.2, WBC 6.4, Plt 240.
